summary: Tested reference report bug fix and new References tab feature. All backend tests pass (8/8). Frontend UI tests pass for References tab with 3 sub-tabs (Total, Approved, NP), expandable rows, navigation to bill detail, summary cards, and date filters.
passed_tests: Reference report response has correct structure: total, approved, np, summary
Total view data has required fields: reference, bills, total, customers, bill_list
Approved view only contains sent/approved/edited bills
NP view only contains customers with draft bills (no approved bills)
Date filters work correctly on reference-report endpoint
Dashboard reference_analysis consistent with reference-report (bug fix verified)
Summary math is correct (totals match calculated values)
References tab loads with 3 sub-tabs: Total, Approved, NP
Summary cards show: Total Bills, Total Visitors, Purchased, Non-Purchasers, Conversion %
Total sub-tab shows bar chart and table with reference data
Approved sub-tab shows only approved/sent/edited bills with totals
NP sub-tab shows non-purchaser customers with inquiry count
Expanding a reference row shows individual bills with bill number, customer name, status, amount, date
Clicking a bill in expanded row navigates to /bill/:billId correctly
Refresh button reloads reference report data
Date filters affect reference report when Apply is clicked
critical_code_review_comments: Line 1221-1227 in server.py: reference_analysis now correctly filters by status in ('sent', 'approved', 'edited') - bug fix verified
Line 1424-1541 in server.py: New reference-report endpoint correctly separates Total (all bills), Approved (sent/approved/edited), and NP (customers with only drafts)
Line 1456-1472: Approved view bill_list only includes bills with status in approved_statuses tuple
Line 1494-1509: NP logic correctly identifies customers with drafts but no approved bills using ref_customer_statuses tracking

admin.method: Click 'Admin Login' link on login page, fill credentials, click 'Sign In as Admin'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Reference report feature fully tested. Backend endpoint /api/analytics/reference-report working correctly with date filters. References tab on Reports page (/admin/reports) has 3 sub-tabs. Bug fix verified: reference_analysis in dashboard now only counts sent/approved/edited bills. Test data: Total 15 bills, 7 visitors, 2 purchasers, 6 non-purchasers (29% conversion without filter).

bug_fix_customer_count_consistency.description: reference_analysis now only counts sent/approved/edited bills - both dashboard and reference-report endpoint use consistent counting

returns.total: All bills grouped by reference with bill_list

references_tab_ui.summary_cards: Total Bills, Total Visitors, Purchased, Non-Purchasers, Conversion %
references_tab_ui.expandable_rows: Shows bill_list with bill_number, customer_name, status, amount, date
references_tab_ui.date_filter: Applies to reference report when Apply clicked

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes shown on admin dashboard instead of actual delivery
